system.description:
What it does (SRD): Many monsters with exceptional hearing or scent act sooner in a fight. This seed does not add Listen or Spot; it models only a +2 bonus on initiative checks as a compact stand-in for that kind of special quality.

ThirdEra: On this item’s Details tab, the +2 is entered in Mechanical effects (labeled Keen senses). It stacks with Dexterity, the Improved Initiative feat, and other initiative bonuses.
